globalScale: Can understand a wide range of demanding, longer texts, and recognise implicit meaning.

reading: Can understand long and complex factual and literary texts, appreciating distinctions of style.
listening: Can understand extended speech even when it is not clearly structured.
writing: Can express themselves in clear, well-structured text, expressing points of view at some length.
speaking: Can express themselves fluently and spontaneously without much obvious searching for expressions.
interaction: Can use language flexibly and effectively for social, academic and professional purposes.
